description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu 16.04 that triggers on push and pull requests to the master branch. Use a single job that runs on ubuntu-16.04, checks out the code, installs build dependencies including Qt 5.14, builds Laigter using qmake and make, and creates an AppImage using linuxdeployqt. If the push is a tag, release the AppImage using ghr with xz compression and the GITHUB_TOKEN from secrets.
